reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): The self-peer bypass at L37-38 only affects messages originating from the local node's own peer ID. Phase 03's attack scenario requires either a compromised local validator or malicious modification of the validator client to exploit this bypass. Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json, local_validator is SEMI_TRUSTED with in_scope_for_bug_bounty=false. Configuration issues and attacks requiring local compromise are explicitly out-of-scope.
